name: Blood Pressure Cures
headline: The 10-Day Nurse's Reset — your starting protocol for elevated BP.
description: A focused, plain-English guide written by Joel Polley, RN — twenty years ICU and emergency medicine. The fastest, lowest-friction way to start moving your numbers. Daily steps, the herbs Joel actually trusts, and the lifestyle levers that move blood pressure most. No fluff. No prescriptions. Just the protocol Joel gives friends and family who ask.
who_for: Anyone whose readings are creeping up — or already elevated — and who wants a nurse-vetted starting point that takes 10 days, not a year.
what_inside: 10-day daily-action plan (PDF)
Joel's 7 most-trusted BP herbs with safe dosing ranges
What to ask your cardiologist before your next visit
The four lifestyle levers that move BP fastest
outcomes: A clear daily routine you can start tomorrow
Understanding of why your BP runs high
A short list of herbs that have actual evidence
Confidence to talk to your doctor as a partner

name: The BP Reset Kit
headline: The complete blood pressure system — the one Joel reaches for first.
description: Everything in the starter guide, plus the full nurse-designed system: the 10-Day BP Reset Challenge, the Full-Stack BP Activation, the BP Reset Graduation phase, and Joel's complete herb-and-lifestyle library. This is the kit Joel built for the readers who said 'just give me the whole thing.' Daily PDFs, dosing charts, a printable tracker, and the same explanations Joel gives at the bedside.
who_for: You want the complete system — not just one guide. You want to understand why each step works, you want every herb dose laid out, and you want a tracker so you can see the numbers move.
what_inside: 10-Day BP Reset Challenge (full daily PDFs)
Full-Stack BP Activation protocol
BP Reset Graduation phase (weeks 2–4)
Joel's complete BP herb formulary with dosing ranges
Printable BP tracker + readings log
Medication-interaction quick-reference
All future updates to the BP Reset library
outcomes: A measurable drop in systolic and diastolic readings
A daily routine you can sustain without thinking
Confidence about which herbs are safe with your meds
A clear conversation to bring to your next cardiology visit

name: The Cortisol Healing Blueprint
headline: The starter protocol for chronically wired-tired stress hormones.
description: Joel's entry-level cortisol guide — the one he sends people who say 'I'm tired but I can't sleep.' A focused walk through the cortisol curve, why yours is broken, the four daily moves that flatten the spikes, and the herbs Joel trusts for adrenal recovery. Written for the reader who needs a starting point, not the whole library.
who_for: You feel wired-tired. You sleep but don't feel rested. You crash at 3 PM and get a second wind at 10. You want to understand what cortisol is doing — and how to start fixing it.
what_inside: The Cortisol Healing Blueprint (PDF)
Joel's 4 daily moves to flatten the cortisol curve
The 5 adrenal herbs Joel actually trusts
A simple morning + evening routine you can hold for 14 days
outcomes: Understanding of why you're wired-tired
A morning routine that doesn't require a 6 AM workout
An evening routine that lets you actually fall asleep
A short list of safe, evidence-backed adrenal herbs

name: The Cortisol Reset Kit

description: The 10-Day Cortisol Cure plus the full library: Cortisol Healing Blueprint, the Cortisol Movement Protocol, herb dosing charts, the sleep-and-HRV tracker, and the same explanations Joel gives readers who say 'just give me everything.' Cortisol pulls blood pressure, blood sugar, sleep, and weight — fix it once and the rest gets easier.
who_for: You want the whole cortisol system — sleep, stress, HRV, weight, and the way it pulls your blood pressure with it. You want a 10-day reset that actually fits a life.

All future updates to the Cortisol library
outcomes: Falling asleep in under 20 minutes, most nights
Waking with energy instead of dread
A measurable drop in afternoon crashes
Side benefit: blood pressure and weight start moving too

name: Blood Sugar Cures
headline: The starter protocol for crashes, cravings, and creeping A1C.
description: Joel's entry-level glucose guide. The fastest, simplest way to start understanding insulin resistance — what your fasting number actually means, the four moves that flatten glucose curves, and the herbs Joel trusts for early metabolic dysfunction. Plain English. Built for the reader who's pre-diabetic or just sick of the 3 PM crash.
who_for: Your A1C is creeping up. Your doctor said 'pre-diabetes.' You want to know what to do — without going on metformin yet — and you want a nurse-vetted starting point.
what_inside: Blood Sugar Cures starter PDF
What your fasting glucose actually means
Joel's 4 daily moves to flatten glucose curves
The 5 metabolic herbs Joel actually trusts
outcomes: Understanding of insulin resistance in plain English
A flatter glucose curve within 7–14 days
Fewer 3 PM crashes
Confidence to talk to your doctor before they reach for the prescription pad
